steps.title: Map examples to principles
steps.content: The first sentence cites two buildings as examples of a contemporary Japanese design trend: combining sleek metal with traditional organic materials. The second sentence explains the principles behind that combination, linking metal to postwar technological progress and natural materials to older aesthetic traditions.

steps.title: Reject overstated structures
steps.content: A invents a claim that one approach has had more impact. B says the text explains past uses of the materials, which it does not. D overstates the passage as detailing events behind the buildings themselves. The structure is examples of a trend followed by its principles. The answer is C.
